---
title: "Fina-Proj-Rubric"
author: "Mansour Abdoli, PhD"
format: html
fontsize: 12pt
---

# Grading Rubric (100 points)

## 1. Research Question & Variables (10 pts)
- Correct response and explanatory variables (5)
- Clear explanation in context (5)

## 2. Visualization (10 pts)
- Appropriate graph (5)
- Correct description (5)

## 3. Model & Interpretation (20 pts)
- Correct regression equation (10)
- Correct slope interpretation (10)

## 4. Model Fit (10 pts)
- Correct R² (5)
- Meaningful interpretation (5)

## 5. Hypothesis Test (20 pts)
- Correct hypotheses (5)
- Correct p-value and decision (10)
- Correct interpretation (5)

## 6. Conclusion (15 pts)
- Answers research question clearly (10)
- Uses real-world context (5)

## 7. Assumptions & Diagnostics (10 pts)
- Mentions linearity, outliers, residuals (10)

## 8. Clarity & Communication (5 pts)
- Organized, readable, clear explanations
